title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.190 - Incurrence of certain liabilities prohibited
text:
105.190.  Incurrence of certain liabilities prohibited. — The commissioner of administration or the disbursing officer of a county or municipal corporation shall not incur any liability under the bonds required of them as such officials, on account of the duties imposed upon them under sections 105.160 to 105.200.
(L. 1943 p. 332 § 4, A. 1949 H.B. 2046)
